description: Fixed reference images for FLUX.2-klein-9B img2img experiments. Place real PNG files here before running ab_test_klein.py.

style_sheet.description: 1 style reference: overall art style, color palette, line weight, flatness level

character_male.description: Character sheet for KARO — frontal view, plain background, full costume visible

character_female.description: Character sheet for LUMA — frontal view, plain background, full costume visible

character_group.description: Optional: group scene with both characters together for continuity reference

sample_scene_interior.description: Sample cave/interior scene — establishes lighting mood and texture style

sample_scene_exterior.description: Sample savanna/exterior scene — establishes daylight palette and horizon style

notes: Files with null seed_key fall back to text-to-image automatically.
Replace placeholder files with real AI-generated reference sheets before A/B test.
Recommended generation: FLUX.1-dev 12B prompt-only, cherry-pick best candidate.
All female characters must be fully clothed (permanent rule).
Do not commit real image files — add reference_images/*.png to .gitignore.
